Interface ToolCallingChatOptions.Builder<B extends ToolCallingChatOptions.Builder<B>>

All Superinterfaces:
ChatOptions.Builder<B>, Cloneable
All Known Implementing Classes:
AnthropicChatOptions.AbstractBuilder, AnthropicChatOptions.Builder, BedrockChatOptions.AbstractBuilder, BedrockChatOptions.Builder, DeepSeekChatOptions.AbstractBuilder, DeepSeekChatOptions.Builder, DefaultToolCallingChatOptions.Builder, GoogleGenAiChatOptions.AbstractBuilder, GoogleGenAiChatOptions.Builder, MistralAiChatOptions.AbstractBuilder, MistralAiChatOptions.Builder, OllamaChatOptions.AbstractBuilder, OllamaChatOptions.Builder, OpenAiChatOptions.AbstractBuilder, OpenAiChatOptions.Builder
Enclosing interface:
ToolCallingChatOptions
public static interface ToolCallingChatOptions.Builder<B extends ToolCallingChatOptions.Builder<B>> extends ChatOptions.Builder<B>
A builder to create a ToolCallingChatOptions instance.
Since:
1.0.0
Author:
Thomas Vitale, Ilayaperumal Gopinathan, Christian Tzolov

      the ToolCallingChatOptions Builder.
